headline: Build notes and release-check now produce cleaner launch packets and copy-ready support handoff summaries.
notes: Adds a launch handoff block to Build notes so the current version, release headline, and support links can be copied as one clean packet after deploy.
Introduces a live launch verdict band on release-check that turns checklist, diagnostics, and smoke results into a clearer share/no-share summary.
Tightens the public support handoff so release confirmation and page note links are easier to pass along without internal-feeling wording.
